# CWE-356 vulnerable: Product UI does not Warn User of Unsafe Actions (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-356-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func DeleteWorkspaceRecords(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) error {
	slug := r.URL.Query().Get("workspace")
	if slug == "" {
		http.Error(w, "workspace required", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return http.ErrMissingFile
	}
	_, err := db.Exec("DELETE FROM workspaces WHERE slug = ?", slug)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	w.Write([]byte(`{"deleted":true}`))
	return nil
}
